Title: Create new internship group voi thong tin hop le
Objective: Verify functionality for create new internship group khi enter day du cac thong tin bat buoc va hop le.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Internship Management interface.
Cac lop hoc "PNV26A" va "PNV26B" da exist in system va chua duoc gan vao bat ky internship group nao trong cung nam hoc.
TestData: GroupName="Nhom Thuc tap 2026 - Nam 2"; InternshipYear="Second Year"; Batches="PNV26A", "PNV26B"; StartDate="2026-08-01"
Steps:
1. Nhan nut "Create new internship group".
2. Enter Ten group la "Nhom Thuc tap 2026 - Nam 2".
3. Select Nam internship la "Second Year".
4. Tich select cac lop hoc "PNV26A" va "PNV26B".
5. Select Start Date la "2026-08-01".
6. Nhan nut "Save".
ExpectedResult:
System display notification create group successfully.
Nhom internship moi xuat hien trong danh sach display voi status la "On-going".
Cac lop hoc da select duoc lien ket chinh xac voi group nay.

Title: Internship group creation fails due to empty group name
Objective: Verify system bao error va ngan chan create internship group neu blank ten group.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Create New Internship Group interface.
Lop hoc "PNV26A" chua duoc gan cho internship group nao trong nam hoc.
Steps:
1. De trong truong Ten group.
2. Select Nam internship la "Second Year".
3. Tich select lop hoc "PNV26A".
4. Select Start Date la "2026-08-01".
5. Nhan nut "Save".
ExpectedResult:
System display notification error requires enter Ten group (e.g.: "Group Name is required.").
Nhom internship moi khong duoc save vao system.
Notes: Related to Validation Rules (Section 7), Error Handling (Section 8)

2. Select Nam internship la "Second Year".
3. Khong select bat ky lop hoc nao trong danh sach.
4. Select Start Date la "2026-08-01".
5. Nhan nut "Save".
ExpectedResult:
System display notification error requires select it nhat mot lop hoc (e.g.: "At least one batch is required.").
Nhom internship moi khong duoc save vao system.
Notes: Related to Validation Rules (Section 7), Error Handling (Section 8)

Title: Create internship group failed do select lop hoc da duoc gan vao internship group khac trong cung nam hoc
Objective: Verify system denies create new internship group chua lop hoc da duoc gan cho internship group khac trong cung nam hoc.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Da ton tai internship group "Nhom A" cho nam hoc "Second Year" chua lop "PNV26A".
TestData: GroupName="Nhom B"; InternshipYear="Second Year"; Batches="PNV26A"; StartDate="2026-08-01"
Steps:
1. Nhan nut "Create new internship group".
2. Enter Ten group la "Nhom B".
3. Select Nam internship la "Second Year".
4. Select lop hoc la "PNV26A".
5. Select Start Date la "2026-08-01".
6. Nhan nut "Save".
ExpectedResult:
System denies save va display notification error (e.g.: lop PNV26A da duoc gan cho mot internship group khac trong nam hoc nay - "Batch already assigned").
Nhom internship "Nhom B" khong duoc create.
Notes: Related to Batch Assignment Rule (Rule 6.2), Error Handling (Section 8)

6. Nhan nut "Save".
ExpectedResult:

Lop PNV26A duoc gan vao group "Nhom Nam 3" ma khong co error.

Title: Archive internship group dang hoat dong
Objective: Verify functionality for Archive (Archive) mot internship group dang o status On-going.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Da ton tai internship group "Nhom Thuc tap 2026" o status On-going.
Steps:
1. Tim internship group "Nhom Thuc tap 2026" tren interface danh sach.
2. Nhan vao bieu tuong/nut "Archive" (Archive) cua group nay.
3. Xac nhan archive o hop thoai xac nhan.
ExpectedResult:
System display notification archive successfully.
Status cua internship group chuyen sang "Archived".
Nhom internship nay bi an khoi danh sach hoat dong binh thuong.

Title: Kich hoat lai internship group da archive
Objective: Verify functionality for khoi phuc/kich hoat lai (Reactivate) mot internship group da bi archive.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Da co internship group "Nhom Thuc tap 2026" o status Archived.
Steps:
1. Truy cap vao danh sach cac internship group da archive (Archived Groups).
2. Tim group "Nhom Thuc tap 2026".
3. Nhan vao nut "Khoi phuc" hoac "Kich hoat lai" (Reactivate).
4. Xac nhan o hop thoai.
ExpectedResult:
System display notification kich hoat lai successfully.
Status cua group chuyen tu "Archived" ve "On-going".
Nhom internship xuat hien tro lai trong danh sach group dang hoat dong.

Title: Phan cong internship cho student don le
Objective: Verify functionality for phan cong mot student vao mot company doi tac.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Dang o interface danh sach student cua internship group "Nhom Thuc tap 2026" (status On-going).
Hoc vien "Nguyen Van A" dang o status chua duoc phan cong (Unassigned).
Cong ty "TechCorp" dang o status hoat dong (khong bi an).
Steps:
1. Tim student "Nguyen Van A" trong bang phan cong student.
2. Nhap vao o select company cua student "Nguyen Van A".
3. Select company "TechCorp" tu danh sach goi y.
4. Nhan nut "Save thay doi".
ExpectedResult:
System display notification phan cong successfully.
Hoc vien "Nguyen Van A" display company da gan la "TechCorp".
So luong student chua phan cong tren nhan cphoto bao (Warning Badge) tu dong giam di 1.
Notes: Related to M05-F04, M05-F06, Rule 6.4, Rule 6.11

Title: Phan cong internship hang loat cho nhieu student cung luc
Objective: Verify functionality for select nhieu student va phan cong vao cung mot company cung luc.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Dang o interface danh sach student cua internship group.
Co it nhat 3 student dang o status chua phan cong (e.g.: Nguyen Van B, Tran Thi C, Le Van D).
Cong ty "TechCorp" dang hoat dong.
TestData: SelectedStudents="Nguyen Van B", "Tran Thi C", "Le Van D"; AssignedCompany="TechCorp"
Steps:
1. Tich select cac o vuong (checkbox) dau dong cua student "Nguyen Van B", "Tran Thi C" va "Le Van D".
2. Nhan nut "Phan cong hang loat" (Bulk Assign).
3. Select company "TechCorp" trong hop thoai hien ra.
4. Nhan nut "Ap dung" hoac "Save".
ExpectedResult:
System display notification phan cong hang loat successfully.
Ca 3 student tren deu display company duoc phan cong la "TechCorp".
So luong tren nhan cphoto bao student chua phan cong tu dong giam di 3.
Notes: Related to M05-F04, M05-F06, Rule 6.4, Rule 6.11

Title: Thay doi company da phan cong cua student

Hoc vien "Nguyen Van A" dang duoc phan cong o company "TechCorp".
Cong ty "PNV Software" dang hoat dong trong system.

2. Mo danh sach select company cua student nay va doi tu "TechCorp" sang "PNV Software".
3. Nhan nut "Save thay doi".
ExpectedResult:
System cap nhat successfully.
Cong ty phan cong moi cua student "Nguyen Van A" display la "PNV Software".
Phan cong cu tai "TechCorp" bi replace hoan toan.
Nhan cphoto bao student chua phan cong khong thay doi so luong.

Title: Huy bo phan cong company cua student bang cach select No Company

User is logged in as Staff.

2. Nhap vao o select company, select gia tri "(No Company)".

System save successfully.
Hoc vien "Nguyen Van A" display status la chua duoc phan cong.
So luong tren nhan cphoto bao student chua phan cong (Warning Badge) tu dong tang len 1.
Notes: Related to M05-F05, M05-F06, Rule 6.5, Rule 6.11, Error Handling (Section 8)

Title: An company va kiem tra xem company do co bi loai khoi danh sach select phan cong moi hay khong
Objective: Verify quy tac company bi an (Hidden) khong xuat hien trong dropdown phan cong internship moi.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Da ton tai company "ABC Technology" trong system.
Steps:
1. Vao trang Quan ly Cong ty (Company Management).
2. Tim company "ABC Technology" va select thiet lap "An" (Hidden) cho company nay.
3. Nhan nut "Save status company".
4. Quay lai trang danh sach student cua internship group va mo dropdown phan cong company cua mot student bat ky chua duoc phan cong.
ExpectedResult:
Status an duoc save successfully.
Cong ty "ABC Technology" khong xuat hien trong danh sach dropdown de select phan cong moi.

Title: Dam bao phan cong hien tai cua student khong bi photo huong khi company do bi an
Objective: Verify quy tac cac phan cong hien tai van display chinh xac ten company sau khi company do bi chuyen sang an.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Hoc vien "Tran Thi B" da duoc phan cong tai company "ABC Technology".
Steps:
1. Vao trang Quan ly Cong ty, chuyen status cua "ABC Technology" sang "An" (Hidden) va save lai.
2. Di toi trang danh sach student cua internship group.
3. Observe ban ghi phan cong cua student "Tran Thi B".
ExpectedResult:
Phan cong cua student "Tran Thi B" van duoc display la "ABC Technology" mot cach binh thuong tren interface.
Khong co notification error hay tu dong delete phan cong.

Title: Ghi nhan nhan xet internship successfully cho mot student voi team Training
Objective: Verify functionality for ghi nhan nhan xet internship cho student thuoc doi ngu Training.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Dang o interface danh sach student internship group.
Hoc vien "Nguyen Van A" da duoc phan cong internship.
TestData: StudentName="Nguyen Van A"; FeedbackTeam="Training"; FeedbackDate="2026-08-15"; FeedbackNotes="Tien bo tot, chu dong trong task."
Steps:
1. Tim student "Nguyen Van A" trong danh sach.
2. Nhap vao nut "Add nhan xet" (Add Feedback) cua student nay.
3. Select Team nhan xet la "Training".
4. Enter Ngay nhan xet la "2026-08-15".
5. Enter Noi dung nhan xet la "Tien bo tot, chu dong trong task.".
6. Nhan nut "Save nhan xet".
ExpectedResult:
Nhan xet duoc save successfully.
Thong tin nhan xet moi xuat hien duoi ten student voi dung Team "Training", ngay va noi dung nhan xet tuong ung.

Title: Bo qua cac dong nhan xet trong khong save vao system
Objective: Verify system bo qua va khong save cac dong nhan xet khong chua noi dung (trong).
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Dang o interface Add nhan xet cho student.
Steps:
1. Mo interface enter nhan xet cua student.
2. Select Team la "ERO" va select ngay nhan xet.
3. Bo trong truong Noi dung nhan xet (Notes).
4. Nhan nut "Save".
ExpectedResult:
System bo qua dong nhan xet nay, khong create ban ghi moi trong co so du lieu (Google Sheets).
Khong display notification error nhung cung not displayed ban ghi nhan xet trong nay tren UI.

Title: Ghi nhan nhan xet giong nhau cho nhieu student cung luc (Same for All)
Objective: Verify tinh nang ghi nhan nhan xet hang loat va ap dung noi dung giong nhau cho cac student duoc select.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Dang o interface danh sach student cua internship group.
Co it nhat 2 student duoc select (e.g.: Nguyen Van A, Tran Thi B).
TestData: SelectedStudents="Nguyen Van A", "Tran Thi B"; FeedbackTeam="Educators"; FeedbackDate="2026-08-15"; FeedbackNotes="Ky nang giao tiep xuat sac."
Steps:
1. Tich select checkbox cua student "Nguyen Van A" va "Tran Thi B".
2. Nhan nut "Nhan xet hang loat" (Batch Feedback / Same for All).
3. Select Team la "Educators", select Ngay nhan xet la "2026-08-15", enter Noi dung nhan xet chung la "Ky nang giao tiep xuat sac.".
4. Nhan nut "Ap dung va Save".
ExpectedResult:
System save successfully nhan xet cho ca hai student.
Ca student "Nguyen Van A" va "Tran Thi B" deu display ban ghi nhan xet cua Educators voi cung noi dung "Ky nang giao tiep xuat sac." vao ngay 2026-08-15.

Title: Mo rong/thu gon danh sach student va display nhan cphoto bao trong danh sach internship group
Objective: Verify functionality for mo rong/thu gon (expand/collapse) cua tung internship group, dieu huong va display chinh xac nhan cphoto bao (Warning Badge).
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Dang o man hinh danh sach internship group.
Co internship group "Nhom Thuc tap 2026" chua 2 student chua gan company.
Steps:
1. Observe dong display cua internship group "Nhom Thuc tap 2026".
2. Verify whether co display nhan cphoto bao student chua gan hay khong (e.g.: "2 student chua phan cong" hoac "2 Unassigned").
3. Nhap vao nut/bieu tuong mui ten mo rong (Expand) cua internship group nay.
4. Nhap lai vao nut/bieu tuong thu gon (Collapse) cua internship group.
ExpectedResult:
Nhan cphoto bao display chinh xac so luong student chua gan (e.g.: "⚠ 2 Unassigned" hoac tuong tu).
Khi click Mo rong, danh sach student chi tiet cua group display ngay ben duoi.
Khi click Thu gon, danh sach chi tiet duoc an di.
